overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a convertible driving through Night City at night during heavy rain. The vehicle navigates from a highway near a stadium, through winding urban streets lined with neon billboards and palm trees, and finally arrives at a large plaza filled with massive digital screens.

agents.ego_description: driving convertible at high speed on rain-slicked highway, leaving the stadium area behind

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining distance

entered.detail: large curved stadium with illuminated blue accent lighting on the roof
concrete overpass spanning the highway ahead with street lights underneath
tall modern street light with horizontal LED bar illuminating the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet multi-lane highway at night, with a large stadium structure visible on the left. The camera follows a convertible driving at high speed, rain creating reflective surfaces on the asphalt. Street lights and distant city buildings line the horizon as the vehicle maintains a steady course behind a black sedan.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with palm trees and neon signage

events.description: transitions from open highway to denser urban street with commercial buildings and palm trees

agents.ego_description: navigating through city streets, passing the softsys building and approaching the NCPD sign on the hillside

notable_agents.action: dark colored SUV passing in the left lane, moving faster than ego

entered.detail: tall commercial building with prominent green 'softsys' neon signage
tall palm trees lining the right side of the road, swaying slightly
large illuminated sign on the hillside reading 'NCPD' in white letters

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a denser urban environment characterized by the green-glowing 'softsys' building on the left and palm trees lining the right side. The NCPD sign becomes visible on the distant hillside as the road curves gently. Other vehicles pass by occasionally on the rain-soaked streets, and the stadium from the previous segment disappears from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding urban road with dense neon signage and sharp curves

events.description: navigates sharp right turn on wet road, tires slipping slightly
approaches tunnel entrance beneath overpass, transitioning to covered roadway

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through tight city corners, braking for turns and navigating around other traffic

notable_agents.action: white sedan ahead taking the curve, brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: large pink circular neon sign mounted on building facade
dark tunnel opening beneath concrete overpass structure
yellow and black striped concrete barriers marking the tight curve

segments.scene_description: The driving becomes more technical as the vehicle navigates winding city streets lined with dense neon signage including a prominent pink circular sign. The road features sharp curves marked by striped barriers. The softsys building and NCPD sign fade from view as the vehicle approaches a tunnel entrance beneath an overpass, with palm trees now visible only in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel leading to central plaza with massive digital displays

events.description: exits tunnel into vast open plaza filled with towering digital billboards and neon advertisements

agents.ego_description: emerging from the underpass into a massive illuminated plaza, continuing toward the city center

entered.detail: concrete tunnel structure with overhead lighting creating dark enclosed space
enormous curved digital screen displaying advertisements towering over the plaza
multiple large digital displays and holographic advertisements surrounding the open square

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a brief tunnel section beneath the city structures before emerging into a vast, open plaza dominated by massive digital billboards and holographic advertisements. The environment shifts from the enclosed tunnel to an expansive, brightly lit urban square with futuristic architecture and towering glass buildings covered in neon displays.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked highway into the heart of a neon-drenched urban plaza. It begins by trailing a convertible at high speed past a massive stadium, where the asphalt reflects the glow of distant city lights under a heavy downpour. As the vehicle leaves the highway, the scene shifts into a denser district characterized by palm trees and the green glow of a softsys building before the road curves through winding streets lined with vibrant pink neon signage and striped barriers. The camera then follows the car through a brief, enclosed tunnel beneath an overpass, which serves as a transition from the narrow city corridors to a wide-open space. Finally, the vehicle emerges into a vast plaza dominated by towering glass architecture and massive holographic advertisements that illuminate the rainy night.
